mapper.select: select id, symbol, ticker, exchange, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, logo_status, logo_checked_at, market_type, asset_type, currency, country, sector, industry, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where is_active = true and ( ticker_normalized like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') or replace(ticker_normalized, ' ', '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') or coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') or replace(coalesce(name_ko_normalized, ''), ' ', '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') or name_en_normalized like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') or replace(name_en_normalized, ' ', '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') ) order by case when ticker_normalized = lower(trim(#{keyword})) then 1 when replace(ticker_normalized, ' ', '') = lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})) then 2 when ticker_normalized like concat(lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 3 when replace(ticker_normalized, ' ', '') like concat(lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') then 4 when coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') = lower(trim(#{keyword})) then 5 when replace(coalesce(name_ko_normalized, ''), ' ', '') = lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})) then 6 when coalesce(name_ko_normalized, '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 7 when replace(coalesce(name_ko_normalized, ''), ' ', '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') then 8 when name_en_normalized like concat('%', lower(trim(#{keyword})), '%') then 9 when replace(name_en_normalized, ' ', '') like concat('%', lower(trim(#{compactKeyword})), '%') then 10 else 11 end, ticker_normalized asc limit #{limit}

select id, symbol, ticker, exchange, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, logo_status, logo_checked_at, market_type, asset_type, currency, country, sector, industry, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, symbol, ticker, exchange, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, logo_status, logo_checked_at, market_type, asset_type, currency, country, sector, industry, is_active, created_at, updated_at from stocks where is_active = true and finnhub_symbol is not null order by id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into stocks ( symbol, ticker, exchange, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, currency, country, sector, industry, is_active, last_master_sync_at ) values
( #{stock.symbol}, #{stock.symbol}, #{stock.exchange}, #{stock.exchange}, #{stock.symbol}, #{stock.nameKo}, #{stock.nameEn}, #{stock.tickerNormalized}, #{stock.nameKoNormalized,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.nameEnNormalized}, #{stock.searchText}, #{stock.logoUrl}, #{stock.assetType}, #{stock.assetType}, #{stock.currency}, #{stock.country}, #{stock.sector}, #{stock.industry}, true, #{stock.syncedAt} )
on conflict (symbol) do update set ticker = excluded.ticker, exchange = excluded.exchange, exchange_code = excluded.exchange_code, finnhub_symbol = coalesce(stocks.finnhub_symbol, excluded.finnhub_symbol), name_ko = coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko), name_en = excluded.name_en, ticker_normalized = excluded.ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized = case when coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko) is null then null else lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko))) end, name_en_normalized = excluded.name_en_normalized, search_text = trim( concat_ws( ' ', excluded.ticker_normalized, excluded.name_en_normalized, lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko, ''))) ) ), logo_url = coalesce(excluded.logo_url, stocks.logo_url), market_type = excluded.market_type, asset_type = excluded.asset_type, currency = excluded.currency, country = excluded.country, sector = coalesce(excluded.sector, stocks.sector), industry = coalesce(excluded.industry, stocks.industry), is_active = true, last_master_sync_at = excluded.last_master_sync_at, updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update stocks set is_active = false, updated_at = now() where country = 'US' and is_active = true and ( last_master_sync_at is null or last_master_sync_at < #{syncedAt} )

update stocks set logo_url = #{logoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logo_status = #{logoStatus}, logo_checked_at = #{checkedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and (logo_url is null or trim(logo_url) = '')
mapper.select: select id from stocks where finnhub_symbol = #{finnhubSymbol} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into stocks ( symbol, ticker, exchange, exchange_code, finnhub_symbol, name_ko, name_en, ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized, name_en_normalized, search_text, logo_url, market_type, asset_type, currency, country, is_active ) values ( #{ticker}, #{ticker}, #{exchangeCode}, #{exchangeCode}, #{finnhubSymbol}, #{nameKo}, #{nameEn}, #{tickerNormalized}, #{nameKoNormalized}, #{nameEnNormalized}, #{searchText}, #{logoUrl}, #{marketType}, #{marketType}, 'USD', 'US', true ) on conflict (ticker, exchange_code) do update set symbol = excluded.symbol, exchange = excluded.exchange, finnhub_symbol = excluded.finnhub_symbol, name_ko = coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko), name_en = excluded.name_en, ticker_normalized = excluded.ticker_normalized, name_ko_normalized = case when coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko) is null then null else lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko))) end, name_en_normalized = excluded.name_en_normalized, search_text = trim( concat_ws( ' ', excluded.ticker_normalized, excluded.name_en_normalized, lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(stocks.name_ko), ''), excluded.name_ko, ''))) ) ), logo_url = coalesce(nullif(excluded.logo_url, ''), stocks.logo_url), market_type = excluded.market_type, asset_type = case when upper(coalesce(excluded.asset_type, '')) like '%ETF%' then 'ETF' else 'STOCK' end, currency = excluded.currency, country = excluded.country, is_active = true, updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update stocks set symbol = ticker, exchange = #{exchangeCode}, exchange_code = #{exchangeCode}, finnhub_symbol = #{finnhubSymbol}, name_ko = coalesce(nullif(trim(name_ko), ''), #{nameKo}), name_en = #{nameEn}, ticker_normalized = #{tickerNormalized}, name_ko_normalized = case when coalesce(nullif(trim(name_ko), ''), #{nameKo}) is null then null else lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(name_ko), ''), #{nameKo}))) end, name_en_normalized = #{nameEnNormalized}, search_text = trim( concat_ws( ' ', #{tickerNormalized}, #{nameEnNormalized}, lower(trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(name_ko), ''), #{nameKo}, ''))) ) ), logo_url = coalesce(nullif(#{logoUrl}, ''), logo_url), market_type = #{marketType}, asset_type = case when upper(coalesce(#{marketType}, '')) like '%ETF%' then 'ETF' else 'STOCK' end, currency = coalesce(currency, 'USD'), country = coalesce(country, 'US'), is_active = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
